Speakers.Speaker: UNUSED
Retrieve the first old document.
Retrieve the second old document.
Retrieve the third old document.
Retrieve the fourth old document.
Retrieve the fifth old document.
Retrieve the sixth old document.
Retrieve the seventh old document.
Retrieve the last old document.
Retrieve the progress report.
Traverse the Monad Passage.
Defeat the Shadow of the Void.
Bring me a Muscle Drink.
Bring me an Invigorate 2.
Bring me a Dekaja Gem.
I'd like to try aojiru.
Bring me some potent medicine.
Let me hear music unique to Gekkoukan.
I'd like to try a beef bowl.
Please prevail in the Big Eater Challenge.
I'd like to be gifted a bouquet of flowers.
Experiment with fortune telling.
I'd like to see a pair of Max Safety Shoes.
Bring me the mysterious person's autograph.
I want to eat a chilled taiyaki.
I'd like to try a home-cooked meal.
I'd like to see a mysterious potato.
Attempt a hundred shrine visits.
Look for the drink with my name.
I'd like to see proof of a bond.
I want to look fashionable.
Find me a beautiful tile.
I wish to feel the ocean.
I wish to become a straw millionaire.
Bring me my Christmas present.
Defeat a Greedy Shadow.
Perform All-Out Attacks.
I want Jack Frost dolls.
I'd like to try sushi.
Create a Persona that's level 30 or above.
Create a Persona with Mabufu.
Create a Persona that's level 38 or above.
Create a Persona with Fatal End.
Create a Persona that's level 46 or above.
Create a Persona with Gigantic Fist.
Create a Persona that's level 54 or above.
Create a Persona with Auto Masuku.
Create a Persona with Auto Maraku.
Fusion Series #1: High Priestess, Sarasvati
Fusion Series #2: Lovers, Titania
Fusion Series #3: Devil, Succubus
Fusion Series #4: Hierophant, Daisoujou
Fusion Series #5: Hierophant, Kohryu
Fusion Series #6: Tower, Masakado
Fusion Series #8: Death, Alice
Fusion Series #9: Fool, Loki
Fusion Series #10: Tower, Masakado
Fusion Series #6: Strength, Siegfried
Bring me a Sengoku-era helm.
I'd like to try Oden Juice.
Bring me food for a furry friend.
Go clean a restroom.
Go water the flowers.
Please feed the cat.
Bring me a Featherman R action figure.
I'd like to walk around Paulownia Mall.
I'd like to visit Iwatodai Station.
I'd like to visit Naganaki Shrine.
I'd like to visit Gekkoukan High.
I'd like to visit your room.
Bring me pine resin.
Bring me a handheld game console.
Bring me a triangular sword.
Bring me protein not for pros.
Bring me a glasses wipe.
Bring me a Christmas star.
Bring me a fruit knife.
Bring me oil.
Bring me Meteor Knuckles.
Bring me a Flash Grenade.
Bring me a Blazing Greatsword.
Bring me Gaea's Grace.
Bring me a Hazakura.
Bring me an Aristocracy.
Bring me Circe's Bow.
Bring me a Pandemonium.
Defeat a rare Shadow #1
Defeat a rare Shadow #2
Shadow Hunting Milestone
Shadow Hunting Milestone #2
Shadow Hunting Milestone #3
Shadow Hunting Milestone #4
Shadow Hunting Milestone #5
Shadow Hunting Milestone #6
Treasure Hunting Milestone
Treasure Hunting Milestone #2
Treasure Hunting Milestone #3
Treasure Hunting Milestone #4
Persona Fusion Milestone
Persona Fusion Milestone #2
Persona Fusion Milestone #3
Special Fusion Milestone
Special Fusion Milestone #2
Bring me a Bloody Button.
Take out the ultimate adversary.
Perform Dreamfest.
Bring me a Lady's Stool.
Bring me Divine Fur.
Bring me Ver. III Restraints.
Bring me Golden Plates.
Bring me a Red Wall Fragment.
Bring me White Sand.
Bring me a Throne of Mania.
Bring me a Cap of Eminence.
Bring me Shackles of Madness.
Bring me an Emperor's Horn.
Bring me an Equal Balance.
Bring me a Ruinous Rotary Leg.
Bring me a Divine Candlestick.

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the top floor of Thebel, the first block in Tartarus. Unless... you already have it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the halfway point of Arqa, the second block in Tartarus. No need to rush—there is no deadline for this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the top floor of Arqa, the second block in Tartarus. Have you had the chance to read the contents of these documents? They are truly intriguing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_004
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the halfway point of Yabbashah, the third block in Tartarus. As for why these documents can be found within that deformed tower... The answer may be on another floor higher up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the top floor of Yabbashah, the third block in Tartarus. I wonder who left behind these writings... Just what sort of person are they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the halfway point of Tziah, the fourth block in Tartarus. Has your perspective changed after discovering the truth, one unbeknownst to the ordinary person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the top floor of Tziah, the fourth block in Tartarus. This will be fairly high up in the tower. I wish you a safe journey there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the halfway point of Harabah, the fifth block in Tartarus. This will be my final request regarding the old documents. I look forward to your report of success.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 0 2} from the top floor of Harabah, the fifth block in Tartarus. This document lies even higher up, waiting to be discovered... I'd love to see it for myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please investigate a certain passage in Yabbashah, the third block, on the 91st floor. Though the entrance appears the same as a Monad door, the inside seems to differ.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat all the Shadows lurking within the Monad Passage on the 91st floor in Yabbashah, the third block.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a presence of immense malevolence... Please defeat the Shadow of the Void lurking within the Monad Passage in the sixth block, Adamah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat the Shadow of the Void lurking within the Monad Passage on the 255th floor in Adamah, the sixth block.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You've no doubt heard of a "Muscle Drink," yes? Would you mind bringing one to me? I believe you may be able to purchase it somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me an {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth an {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me a {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you heard of a drink called "aojiru"? Rumor says it is "super gross." I prefer my drinks tasty and flavorful though. Therefore... would you please bring me a delicious aojiru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've heard that a powerful medicine is being produced in an ominous research facility known as the "nurse's office." Could you please get your hands on that medicine for me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd very much love to listen to a song that is associated with your school. Perhaps it would be wise to check a location within the school that broadcasts music...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a CD associated with Gekkoukan High School.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dish called the "Umiushi Beef Bowl" is allegedly all the rage in town now. If it truly is as exquisite as the rumors suggest, then I would love to have a taste myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Big Eater Challenge, a unique event in which one must devour more food than the other contestants... Such a battle shall be held at the burger establishment at the Iwatodai strip mall. Would you please participate in my stead?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Complete the Big Eater Challenge at Wilduck Burger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_020
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear there is a custom in your world where a woman may receive roses. I would love to experience this myself. Would you please bring me some roses?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear there is a fortune-teller at the club in Paulownia Mall. Could you verify the accuracy of her readings? One such fortune promises higher chances of encountering rare Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Make use of the Rarity Fortune that increases the appearances of rare Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In the online shopping world, these "Max Safety Shoes" appear to be extremely popular as of late. I wonder what makes them so "Max"... As my curiosity is killing me, I'd love to take a look at them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear a certain individual from the online shopping world often appears in your world as well. It seems he has quite the distinctive personality. Would you please meet this person and get me his autograph?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Get an autograph from President Tanaka of Tanaka's Amazing Commodities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I heard that your world has a strange "taiyaki" that is cold despite having been grilled. It must be filled with flavors that are simply out of this world... I'd love to have a taste myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_025
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what a "home-cooked meal" tastes like... You may bring either food or beverage—I've no preference.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a food or drink you made together with someone at the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_026
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a rumor that claims a potato raised with love and care will develop a mysterious power... Could you verify if such a potato can really be grown?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a potato that you've grown.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_027
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a ritual called "a hundred shrine visits" that supposedly grants wishes... I would love to witness the miracle of the gods myself. My wish is for a 500-yen bill.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring what you receive from praying at the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}According to rumors, the beverage bearing the same name as me is only available in an unpopular location. Please search for it and bring it to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a drink that shares a name with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bond is normally invisible to the naked eye. However, it is sometimes shown through the act of gift-giving... Would you please show me an item that represents a strong bond you share with someone?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring an item you can only receive when a Social Link has been maxed out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_030
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me a stylish item that would look good on me. I believe you may find something where the young and trendy gather to have a good time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a fashionable item.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_031
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm looking for a small, rectangular tile with a peacock painted on it. Apparently, being in possession of one can cause people to go into a frenzy... I'd like to see one myself, if possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a tile with a peacock design.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_032
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The ocean... To me, it is akin to a realm of dreams since I am unable to leave my post. Would you please bring me a memento that reminds you of the ocean?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring something you find from the ocean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_033
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear there is a method to acquire wealth by simply bartering one item for another continuously. Would you please try it out?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring what you get after bartering items.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_034
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It appears that Santa has been so busy with Christmas this year that he forgot to deliver my present... Would you please find Santa and bring me my present?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Get Elizabeth's Christmas present from Santa.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Checkmate the king of all rare Shadows that appears in Ptolomea, and bring me a {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat the Greedy Shadow in Ptolomea, and bring back {f 2 4 1} {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This task will serve to reaffirm your fundamentals. Exploit the weaknesses of your foes, subsequently knock them down, and then combine the strengths of your allies to deliver a sound beating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Perform a total of 10 All-Out Attacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Word has it there are Jack Frost dolls in your world. I want one to display, one to trade, and one to cherish... Could you please bring me three?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring Elizabeth not 1 {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}, but {f 2 4 1} of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_038
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear a food called "sushi" in your world is consumed during feasts. It must be one tantalizing dish... I would like to try it myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring sushi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 30 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that has the specified skill. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona with the skill Mabufu in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 38 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that has the specified skill. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona with the skill Fatal End in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_045
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 46 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that has the specified skill. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona with the skill Gigantic Fist in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_047
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 54 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that has the specified skill. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona with the skill Auto Masuku in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_049
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that has the specified skill. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona with the skill Auto Maraku in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. There are various combinations that would give birth to a High Priestess, such as Hermit and Fool, Hanged Man and Justice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Sarasvati with the skill Agilao in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. If you have a Persona with the specified skill, please search for a combination that will allow it to be inherited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Titania with the skill Magarula in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. You will not receive any hints for this one. If you manage to obtain this Persona, then you will surely gain invaluable strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Succubus with the skill Charm Boost in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_053
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. One option is to use a Skill Card. It seems that there exists a shop carrying them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Daisoujou with the skill Invigorate 3 in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. Know that Kohryu can only be created through Special Fusion. Do you have the requisite Personas?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have Kohryu in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This shall be the final task for creating Personas. As you have managed to complete all fusion-related tasks thus far, I am confident you will succeed with this one as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Masakado with the skill Unshaken Will in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to ascertain your abilities. One option is to use a Skill Card. It seems that there exists a shop carrying them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Daisoujou with the skill Invigorate 3 in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to help nurture your abilities. Know that Alice can only be created through Special Fusion. Do you have the requisite Personas?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have Alice in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to help nurture your abilities. There seems to be a particular time when your bonds may bless you even more than usual... Why not attempt a fusion during that period?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Loki at level 75 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This shall be the final task for creating Personas. As you have managed to complete all fusion-related tasks thus far, I am confident you will succeed with this one as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Masakado with the skill Charge in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My intent in preparing this task is to help nurture your abilities. You will not receive any hints for this one. If you manage to obtain this Persona, then you will surely gain invaluable strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Siegfried with the skill Endure in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would like to see something called a "helm," a protective covering for the head, one rich with history... I'm sure there exists a person who still cherishes one to this day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring a helm from the Sengoku era.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would like to get my hands on this legendary "Oden Juice." I advise that you first speak with an expert on beverages. My hunch tells me you may find one such person near a persimmon tree.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring some Oden Juice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Will you bring me the sort of food a furry friend on four legs would enjoy? You might be able to get some from that close friend of yours.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_064
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Would you please clean the restroom at the station in an attempt to beautify the city? The tools I have given you should be of use.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the cleaning supplies and clean the restroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_065
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When I visited Gekkoukan High School, the flowers in the flowerbed appeared to be wilting... Would you please water them?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Water the flowerbed at school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_066
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Somewhere in the city, there appears to be a hungry cat who is having trouble finding food. Would you please find and feed the poor thing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Give the hungry cat some food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_067
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me a Featherman R action figure. Again, it has to be a Featherman R action figure and no other Featherman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_068
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've developed a yearning to explore your world. Would you please escort me around Paulownia Mall during the daytime?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth around Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_069
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My yearning to explore your world has grown even stronger. Please escort me around Iwatodai during the daytime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Walk around Iwatodai with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_070
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My yearning to explore your world grows ever stronger still... I would like you to escort me around Naganaki Shrine during the daytime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Walk around Naganaki Shrine with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_071
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can no longer suppress my desire to explore your world. Would you escort me around Gekkoukan High School after its hours of operation?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth around Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My desire to explore your world cannot possibly be abated. Please accompany me to your room during the daytime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Invite Elizabeth to your room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_073
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring me this "pine resin" that is used in archery. Rumor says it looks exactly like soybean powder. I have a feeling you may be able to get some from a close friend of yours.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_074
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Could you bring me a tiny device known as a "handheld game console"? Perhaps you could acquire one from a close friend who enjoys using it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring me what is known as a "triangular sword." I hear this sword has a long history behind it... Perhaps you ought to ask a close friend about it, one who happens to be knowledgeable on such matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would like you to bring me some protein that not only pros can drink, but amateurs, too... I have a hunch that you may be able to acquire some from a very athletic friend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_077
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Will you please bring me a "glasses wipe"? Based on its name alone, it is my understanding that anyone who wears glasses should be in possession of this item.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me a "Christmas star." Perhaps a close friend well-versed in plants would know something about it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_079
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me a blade that likes to cut through fruit, also known as a "fruit knife." Should there be someone close to you well-versed in the culinary arts, I suggest you ask them first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Would you bring me some oil frequently used by one of your acquaintances?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bring the item that Elizabeth is asking for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the weapon {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. You can find it within a special treasure chest in Cocytus. Tread carefully, for I sense a powerful Shadow in its vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_082
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the weapon {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. You can find it within a special treasure chest in Caina. Tread carefully, for I sense a powerful Shadow in its vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_083
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me a {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_084
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the weapon {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. You can find it within a special treasure chest in Antenora. Tread carefully, for I sense a powerful Shadow in its vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_085
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me a {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_086
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the weapon {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. You may find it within a special treasure chest in Ptolomea. Tread carefully, for I sense a powerful Shadow in its vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth an {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_087
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please bring me the weapon {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. You can find it within a special treasure chest in Judecca. Tread carefully, for I sense a powerful Shadow in its vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_088
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me a {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth a {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_089
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from rare Shadows found in Caina. Do keep in mind that these Shadows are extremely quick on their feet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a rare Shadow in Caina, and bring back {f 2 4 1} {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_090
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from rare Shadows found in Antenora. Do keep in mind that these Shadows are extremely quick on their feet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a rare Shadow in Antenora, and bring back {f 2 4 1} {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let us begin with a mild test. Simply subdue a few Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 50 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_092
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The trick to combat is simple, you see. Just end it all in an instant. Strike down the enemy before they can act. This decreases the odds of sustaining injuries, so I advise you keep this in mind. Now, please report to me after defeating a certain number of Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 100 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_093
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Always remain alert the first time you encounter a new Shadow. One surprise attack can land you in hot water... Please exercise the utmost caution as you continue defeating Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 150 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_094
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Though the time and place may change, I suspect your aptitude for fighting Shadows will not. Report back to me once you've eradicated enough of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 200 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_095
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you noticed that every Shadow wears a mask representing the Arcana to which it belongs? A change in perspective can help you discover something new. Now then, report to me once you've reached the target.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 300 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_096
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You may find this sort of task terribly facile now... That said, you won't know for certain until you've attempted it. Now, please let me know once you've managed to defeat a great deal of Shadows. And take care not to get complacent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat a total of 400 Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_097
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Labyrinths and treasure chests... It is certainly a charming combination. By some twist of fate, you can find treasure chests scattered about the Abyss of Time as well. Please retrieve the contents inside whenever you encounter them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open a total of 30 treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_098
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Though treasure chests may be enticing, try not to get distracted by them. You wouldn't want a Shadow to creep up on you now, would you? Though you must have already experienced that by now. In any case, report back to me once you've reached the goal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open a total of 60 treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_099
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A variety of treasure chests exist. Some only contain precious metals, and others require a "key" to open. There seems to be more than meets the eye with these treasure chests... Now then, I look forward to your report of success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open a total of 90 treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since the Abyss of Time is a labyrinthine construct with an ever-changing structure, it may prove difficult to locate a treasure chest that contains the item you're looking for... However, that is part of the fun in exploring. Well then, I await your report of success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open a total of 120 treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_101
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you been fusing your Personas? I recommend doing so once you have reached your limit and are unable to hold any more Personas. I await your report on this matter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Conduct a total of 10 Persona fusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_102
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"If I combine these two, I'll get this, but if I combine those two, what do I get then...?" If, perhaps, you are struggling to decide which Personas to fuse, then I recommend utilizing "Search Fusion." I look forward to your report of success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Conduct a total of 20 Persona fusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_103
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}During fusion, sometimes a Persona's skill will change, or an accident may occur. There are rumors of veterans who make use of these irregularities. Well then, please report to me once you've reached the target.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Conduct a total of 30 Persona fusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Special Fusion is a ritual that combines several Personas into a single new one. Report back to me once you have gained sufficient experience with it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Conduct a total of 3 Special Fusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With deep knowledge of this ritual, I believe you can utilize it to its fullest extent. I eagerly await the report of your success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Conduct a total of 7 Special Fusions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show me an {f 4 4 1 0 0 2}. I have a feeling you can obtain it from the antique shop in Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Show Elizabeth an {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 38 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please show me a Persona that meets or exceeds the required level. Any Persona will do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have a Persona that is level 46 or higher in your possession and report to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You may find this one of the most challenging requests to undertake. Defeat the Reaper and bring me the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have made arrangements for you to battle with the ultimate adversary at the deepest point of Tartarus. Please take down your opponent—alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Defeat the ultimate adversary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_112
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fusion Spells are a hidden power of yours... One of several is called "Dreamfest." To execute this Fusion Spell, you'll need Succubus and another rather naughty demon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Carry out the "Dreamfest" Fusion Spell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from an Elegant Mother. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Cocytus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_114
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Nemean Beast. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Caina.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_115
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drop from a Minotaur III. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Antenora.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drop from a World Balance. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Ptolomea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_117
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Death Castle. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Ptolomea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_118
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from an Eternal Sand. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Judecca.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Vehement Idol. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Judecca.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Grand Magus. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Antenora.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_121
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drop from Crazy Twins. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Ptolomea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_122
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from an Emperor Beetle. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Ptolomea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_123
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Void Giant. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Judecca.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_124
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Rampage Drive. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Judecca.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQUEST_HELP_125
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please retrieve the {f 4 4 1 0 1 2} that drops from a Phantom King. Your target can be found within a Monad door in Empyrean.[n]{f 1 1}
